title: Internal Error in V3DfgBreakCycles: Wrong result width

features.name: multiplication with result width exactly 2x operand width
features.description: Code should include a multiplication operation where the result width is exactly twice the operand width (e.g., 16-bit * 16-bit producing 32-bit result)

features.name: output assignment from multiplication with double-width result
features.description: Code should include a multiplication result assigned to an output wire where the result width is exactly 2x the input width, producing a V3DfgBreakCycles width mismatch
